advancements.story.mine_stone.root.title: Welcome, Budding Witch!
advancements.story.mine_stone.root.descr: Pick a magical flower. Accidentally summon a forest spirit. Standard procedure.
advancements.codex_sorcery.codex_arcanum: You found the Codex Arcanum. Don't read page 42. Trust me.
advancements.codex_sorcery.vital_stump.d: This stump is alive. Or sentient. Or hungry. Probably fine.
advancements.codex_sorcery.fritillaria_m: These seeds are magical. And stylish. Magic but make it fashion.
advancements.codex_sorcery.moonshine_cat: For when the moon just isn’t shiny enough.
advancements.codex_sorcery.clay_jar.desc: You crafted a jar. A jar! Truly a master wizard now.
advancements.codex_sorcery.fire_clay_jar: It's like a normal jar, but with a burning desire to be impressive.
advancements.codex_sorcery.twig_clay_jar: You added a twig. This counts as magic, probably.
advancements.codex_sorcery.moonshine.des: You’re basically gardening the moon. This is fine.
advancements.codex_sorcery.light_infuser: Squeezing pure light for your convenience!
advancements.codex_sorcery.light_jar.des: You caught light in a jar. Not weird at all.
advancements.codex_sorcery.soul_candle.d: Perfect for rituals, ambience, and terrifying your neighbors.
advancements.codex_sorcery.chalk_caniste: For drawing circles you definitely shouldn’t stand inside.
advancements.codex_sorcery.essence_boile: Boils magic. Not recommended for noodles.
advancements.codex_sorcery.essence_bottl: Shake well before unleashing arcane chaos.
advancements.codex_sorcery.essence_amule: Fashion AND danger. A stunning combination.
Beam items between machines and start automating your rituals.
advancements.codex_sorcery.moonshine_sha: Distill lunar energy into a shard that powers advanced devices.
advancements.codex_sorcery.whispering_fr: Capture a fragment of astral static for high-tier crafting.
advancements.codex_sorcery.bluestone_dus: A refined catalyst used for lunar machine upgrades.
advancements.codex_sorcery.lunar_jar.des: Store far more magical fluid and stabilize automation loops.
advancements.codex_sorcery.lunar_infuser: Infuse starlit materials into fluid fuel for your network.
advancements.codex_sorcery.lunar_light_b: Move Noctilume over distance with focused lunar beams.
You can now channel large rituals into block transformation.
Bind altar power to nearby structures for synchronized magic.
advancements.codex_sorcery.arcforge.desc: Forge a late-game magical workstation from lunar machinery.
advancements.codex_sorcery.augment_forge: Complete the automation path with your strongest forge setup.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.astr: Carved stone that drinks offerings and bends them into new shapes. Origin: found in stump-altar ruins or crafted; see JEI for the rite. Use: place an item atop it and let an Astral Nexus guide the transformation.
A focusing heart that binds altar and ritual. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: feed it a catalyst and it ferries the offering to its linked Astral Altar for synchronized rites.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.soul: A candle seeded with captive breath. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: fuels dark rituals and can record sacrifices made nearby for later binding.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.ritu: A blade that demands a price. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: right-click to cut yourself and charge an empty Blood Vial with your signature.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.bloo: A vessel for true-name blood. Origin: crafted or filled by a Ritual Dagger. Use: binds personal rituals and anchors curses or blessings.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.vood: A stitched effigy hungry for a name. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: pairs with a Blood Vial to focus hostile or protective rites.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.whit: A stick of consecrated chalk. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: right-click to lay ritual chalk lines and mark circles of power.
A line of warding chalk pressed into the world. Origin: placed with a chalk stick or canister. Use: forms ritual circles and safe boundaries for rites.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.chal: A canister that pours chalk like moonlight. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: rapidly draws large circles and complex sigils.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.vita: A living stump that hums with old roots. Origin: found in stump-altar structures. Use: anchors woodland rituals and whispers to nearby altars.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.stum: A carved stump, half altar and half memorial. Origin: found in ritual ruins. Use: structural piece for rustic rites and decorations.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.holl: A gate of stillness awaiting ignition. Origin: assembled as a portal frame and lit with a Hollow Igniter. Use: opens a passage into the Hollow.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.esse: An iron cauldron for brewing living essences. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: fill with water, add three ingredients and an empty bottle or amulet to distill an Essence.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.luna: A moonlit reactor that converts starlit materials into Noctilume. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: feed it lunar ingredients to infuse fluid for your network.
A deep reservoir for Noctilume. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: stores far more magical fluid and stabilizes long-distance pipelines.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.item: A beam conduit for physical offerings. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: links machines and pushes items through ritual beams.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.luna: A focused channel for Noctilume. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: sends fluid across distance when powered.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.ligh: The first light-reactor. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: infuses basic materials into light-borne fuel.
A starter reservoir for bright fluid. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: stores light-infused fluid for early automation.
A primitive beam for light fluid. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: pipes Noctilume between machines in a straight line.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.arcf: A late-game forge that hums with lunar heat. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: central workstation for advanced recipes.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.augm: A matrix for final upgrades. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: augments late-game gear and machines.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.smar: A spawner taught to obey redstone. Origin: crafted or upgraded from a vanilla spawner with a Smart Upgrade Template. Use: when powered, it calls its bound mob with fiercer ancient cadence; shift-right-click to reclaim the template while the spawner remembers its soul.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.empt: A bare vessel awaiting infusion. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: place it in an Essence Boiler with three ingredients to bottle an Essence.
A hollow charm for bottled power. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: brew it in an Essence Boiler to create a wearable Essence Amulet.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.esse: A drink of distilled magic. Origin: brewed in an Essence Boiler with three ingredients and an empty bottle. Use: drink for temporary effects and arcane shaders.
A charm that sustains an essence. Origin: brewed in an Essence Boiler with an empty amulet. Use: while carried, it grants ongoing effects tied to its ingredients.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.soft: Unfired clay shell. Origin: crafted from clay; see JEI. Use: smelt into a Clay Jar for further infusions.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.clay: A fired vessel ready for elemental rites. Origin: smelt a Soft Clay Jar. Use: infuse it into specialized jars for elemental blessings.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.fire: A jar holding ember-touched essence. Origin: infuse a Clay Jar with fire-aligned essence or potion. Use: ritual reagent and elemental storage.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.twig: A jar bound to living wood. Origin: infuse a Clay Jar with verdant essence. Use: ritual reagent and nature-tuned storage.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.wind: A jar filled with restless air. Origin: infuse a Clay Jar with wind-aligned essence. Use: ritual reagent and movement-tuned storage.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.wate: A jar sealed with flowing calm. Origin: infuse a Clay Jar with water-aligned essence. Use: ritual reagent and fluid-tuned storage.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.shad: A jar steeped in dusk. Origin: infuse a Clay Jar with shadow-aligned essence. Use: ritual reagent and secrecy-tuned storage.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.ston: A jar with earthen weight. Origin: infuse a Clay Jar with stone-aligned essence. Use: ritual reagent and stability-tuned storage.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.sun_: A jar lit by warm radiance. Origin: infuse a Clay Jar with sun-aligned essence. Use: ritual reagent and light-tuned storage.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.fros: A jar of cold breath. Origin: infuse a Clay Jar with frost-aligned essence. Use: ritual reagent and chill-tuned storage.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.stor: A jar crackling with stormlight. Origin: infuse a Clay Jar with storm-aligned essence. Use: ritual reagent and surge-tuned storage.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.extr: A jar made for pulling power apart. Origin: infuse a Clay Jar with extraction essence. Use: ritual reagent and splitting-tuned storage.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.noct: Luminous fluid in a humble shell. Origin: produced by Light or Lunar Infusers. Use: fuels beams, jars, and noctilume machinery.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.code: The forbidden book of Stellar Sorcery. Origin: crafted or found; its pages awaken with your tier. Use: unlocks lore, recipes, and links to every known rite.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.cele: A sword tempered in star-bright alloy. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: a reliable relic for cutting through the mundane and the cursed.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.auro: A skull that remembers the sky. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: ritual focus, trophy, or reagent for higher rites.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.holl: A spark that opens stillness. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: ignite a Hollow Portal by right-clicking an empty block inside its frame.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.wrai: A cloak woven from fading threads. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: right-click to toggle invisibility while the cloak is active.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.frit: Seeds of a checkered mystic bloom. Origin: found by harvesting Fritillaria. Use: plant on farmland to grow the flower.
A moon-checkered flower of subtle power. Origin: grown from seeds or found in the wild. Use: essence brewing and gentle alchemy.
The living stalk of Fritillaria. Origin: planted on farmland. Use: harvest for flowers and seeds.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.soul: Seeds that hum with quiet spirits. Origin: harvested from Soul Blooms. Use: plant on farmland to cultivate ritual blooms.
A dark flower that leans toward candles. Origin: grown from seeds. Use: ritual reagent and essence ingredient.
The living stalk of Soul Bloom. Origin: planted on farmland. Use: harvest for blooms and seeds.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.cale: A bright wildflower touched by luck. Origin: found in the world; can be potted. Use: essence brewing and gentle rituals.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.red_: A scarlet flower of harm and heat. Origin: found in the world; can be potted. Use: essence brewing and aggressive rites.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.nige: A midnight blossom that drinks the dark. Origin: found in the world; can be potted. Use: essence brewing and shadowed rituals.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.echo: A barbed plant that repeats your steps. Origin: found in the wild. Use: thorny reagent and eerie decoration.
The bloom of the Echo Thorn. Origin: harvested from the plant. Use: delicate reagent and dark garden decor.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.gloo: Dense moss that drinks the light. Origin: found in shadowed places. Use: groundcover for ritual gardens and hush-lit paths.
Thin moss like velvet over stone. Origin: crafted from Gloom Moss. Use: soft, stealthy flooring for sacred sites.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.root: A knotted strand of living soil. Origin: gathered from stump sites or driftsoil. Use: early ritual component and crafting fiber.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.blue: Refined star-touched powder. Origin: crafted from bluestone sources; see JEI. Use: upgrades and lunar machinery.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.moon: Condensed moonfire from crystal growth. Origin: harvested from Moonshine clusters. Use: powers lunar devices and advanced recipes.
A catalyst that coaxes lunar growth. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: fuels infusions and guides moonshine formation.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.whis: A shard of astral static. Origin: rare drops from deep rituals or high-tier crafting. Use: late-game components.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.null: A dense fleck of null-alloy. Origin: crafted from ingots or found in ancient caches. Use: compress into Nullite Ingots.
A heavy ingot that swallows light. Origin: crafted from nuggets; see JEI. Use: smart machines and resilient tools.
A monument of null-alloy. Origin: crafted from ingots; see JEI. Use: storage and late-game construction.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.smar: A template etched with obedient sigils. Origin: crafted or found; see JEI. Use: right-click a vanilla spawner to make it smart, and shift-right-click the smart spawner to reclaim the template.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.grim: Stone baked in the Hollow's silence. Origin: mined in the Hollow or its ruins. Use: sturdy building and ritual foundations.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.eldr: Dense stone kissed by old starlight. Origin: mined deep underground. Use: crafting base for lunar components.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.moon: Eldrite laced with lunar shards. Origin: refined or found near moonshine growth. Use: high-tier crafting.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.drif: Soil that drifts toward magic. Origin: found in corrupted patches. Use: till it to grow special crops.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.till: Driftsoil prepared for planting. Origin: till with a hoe. Use: grows magical crops more readily.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.star: A block of captured starlight. Origin: crafted or harvested from celestial sources. Use: light and ritual ambience.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.budd: A living crystal bud that grows moonshine. Origin: found in moonshine geodes. Use: source for moonshine buds and clusters.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.moon: A full bloom of moonshine crystal. Origin: grown from budding moonshine. Use: harvest shards for lunar tech.
A large moonshine growth. Origin: grown from budding moonshine. Use: harvest for shards or decoration.
A medium moonshine growth. Origin: grown from budding moonshine. Use: harvest for shards or decoration.
A small moonshine growth. Origin: grown from budding moonshine. Use: harvest for shards or decoration.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.wrai: Thread spun from a fading wraith. Origin: drops from spectral foes or dark rituals. Use: woven into the Wraith Cloak.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.scro: A blank scroll that awakens when used. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: right-click to imprint a random area, runes, and modifiers, then cast at the cost of health.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.verd: A scroll etched with recall runes. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: casts a recall spell that seeks your bound return point.
A scroll of rapid growth. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: casts a verdant spell that nurtures plants in an area.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.test: A crude focus that hurls a firebolt. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: right-click to cast a small blazing projectile.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.grow: A gaze that feeds the earth through your eyes. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: equip in your gaze slots to spend health and grow nearby plants.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.base: A blank glyph awaiting a name. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: the base for creating Sigils.
codex_arcanum.stellar_sorcery.entry.sigi: A rune-etched charm that attunes on use. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: right-click to bind or activate its effects and shader.
An overlay that lets a helmet carry sigils. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: combine with armor to focus sigil effects.
An overlay that lets a chestplate carry sigils. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: combine with armor to focus sigil effects.
An overlay that lets leggings carry sigils. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: combine with armor to focus sigil effects.
An overlay that lets boots carry sigils. Origin: crafted; see JEI. Use: combine with armor to focus sigil effects.
